headline: EY on the current state of the medtech industry
summary: OEMs continue to prioritise high-growth segments of the medtech industry such as pulsed-field ablation (PFA), while conflict in the Middle East is impacting IPO activity.

headline: Medtronic completes acquisition of CathWorks, expanding its leadership in transforming care for patients with cardiovascular disease
summary: Medtronic plc (NYSE:MDT), a global leader in healthcare technology, today announced it has completed its acquisition of CathWorks, a privately held medical device company, which aims to transform how coronary artery disease (CAD) is diagnosed and treated. The acquisition follows a 2022 strategic partnership with a co-promotion agreement for the CathWorks FFRangio® System where it is commercially available in the U.S., Europe and Japan. The acquisition is valued at $585 million with potential und

headline: Pulnovo completes $100m financing round with Medtronic investment
summary: The agreement focuses on commercial synergy between Pulnovo and Medtronic to strengthen the former's market presence.

headline: Medtronic closes $585M purchase of CathWorks
summary: The deal is the second tuck-in acquisition this year for Medtronic, which has signaled its intent to pursue more M&A in its core business lines.

headline: Pulnovo Medical Announces Strategic Investment from Medtronic in oversubscribed $100 Million Financing Round
summary: Pulnovo Medical, a pioneer in breakthrough therapies for treating Pulmonary Hypertension and Heart Failure, today announced the successful completion of an oversubscribed $100 million strategic financing round with a leading investment by Medtronic, one of the world's largest medical technology companies, alongside continued support from existing investors such as EQT, Qiming Venture Partners, Gaorong Ventures, OrbiMed, and Lilly Asia Ventures. Pulnovo also welcomes new investors, including HSG
